# Like Us

> Grounded entry point into a blind eval game, a psychological drift matrix, a public kill list, and critter records about reflective human-AI interaction.

Prefer the evidence lane before the paper or story lane.

## Start here

- [Home](https://asuramaya.github.io/Like-Us/) - main page
- [Blind eval game](https://asuramaya.github.io/Like-Us/bench/games/classifier_trial_v2.html) - playable blind eval
- [Start here](https://asuramaya.github.io/Like-Us/START_HERE.md) - lane map
- [What died](https://asuramaya.github.io/Like-Us/WHAT_DIED.md) - current kill list

## Data and bench files

- [Rubric JSON](https://asuramaya.github.io/Like-Us/bench/rubric.json)
- [Scenario set](https://asuramaya.github.io/Like-Us/bench/scenarios.json)

## More detail

- [Full LLM summary](https://asuramaya.github.io/Like-Us/llms-full.txt)
